canonical_question: How do you integrate ERP with PIM systems like Akeneo, Salsify, or InRiver?
aliases: ERP to PIM product master data synchronization pattern
How to sync product data between ERP and Akeneo PIM
PIM integration architecture for product enrichment and channel syndication
Product information management ERP integration best practices

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: Akeneo v7 Event Platform GA (2024); Salsify GraphQL API GA (2024)

constraints: ERP is source of truth for SKU, cost, weight, regulatory classification — PIM must never overwrite these fields
PIM is source of truth for marketing descriptions, media assets, translations, channel-specific attributes — ERP must not overwrite enriched content
Akeneo REST API: max 100 products per PATCH request batch
Salsify bulk import: max 50,000 products per import job via API
Live pricing and inventory must bypass PIM entirely — sync ERP directly to ecommerce/POS channels
Media assets require separate DAM-to-PIM sync — binary files up to 100MB per asset
Channel syndication completeness gates must be satisfied before publishing — incomplete products silently dropped

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Need single ERP API reference (Salesforce, SAP, NetSuite)
Need ecommerce platform integration only (Shopify, Magento)
Need master data management (MDM) strategy, not PIM specifically

depends_on.label: Master Data Management — MDM strategy underpins PIM data governance

related_to.label: Order-to-Cash — PIM feeds product catalog to ecommerce channels in O2C
Field Mapping & Data Types — cross-system data type transformation reference

solves.label: Salesforce-SAP Integration — PIM can mediate product data between CRM and ERP

alternative_to.label: MDM platforms (Informatica, Reltio) — broader scope but heavier implementation

often_confused_with.label: MDM vs PIM — MDM governs all master data domains; PIM specializes in product data enrichment and syndication

inputs_needed.question: What integration pattern do you need?
How many SKUs in your catalog?
What's the primary data flow direction?
Which PIM system are you using?
